name: 杂志编辑风
description: 高端杂志编辑风格，适用于品牌形象、campaign 大片

defaults.background: dark premium backdrop or dramatic scene
defaults.composition: heroic composition, negative space for typography, editorial crop

prompt_template.subject: editorial fashion shoot featuring {product_description}
prompt_template.quality: high fashion editorial photography, magazine cover quality

overrides.background: dramatic dark space with single light source
overrides.lighting: single hard key light, deep shadows, high contrast
overrides.composition: model with product, strong silhouette, magazine crop
product as art object, dramatic shadow play, cinematic
product centered, top third empty for masthead/headline, cover format
